pageContext.name: Be@rbrick Astro Boy (Sleeping Version) 1000%
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Medicom Toy are proud to present the Be@rbrick Astro Boy (Sleeping Version) 1000% Collectible Figure!  This figure stands at 27.55' tall and features the heroic and adventurous Astro Boy taking a well-deserved nap.  Don't miss your chance to add this Be@rbrick collectible to your collection today!
